prelaunch.headline: The IT hardware secondary market, <accent>organized</accent>.
prelaunch.description: GuildMark connects mid-market IT teams offloading refreshed hardware with small and medium businesses looking for certified, fairly priced gear — no brokers, no spreadsheets.
